description: Dalian's traditional commercial center, featuring numerous shopping malls, restaurants, and metro transportation.
The core beachfront of Golden Pebble Beach, with fine sand and clear seawater, ideal for seaside leisure.
A national first-class museum housing nearly 200,000 specimens, with extensive exhibits of marine life and dinosaur fossils.
Dalian's historic core area, surrounded by multiple century-old European-style buildings showcasing the city's historical evolution.
A seaside park with a bathing beach, suitable for family outings and seaside leisure.
The world's first museum themed around the mysteries of life, showcasing plastinated biological specimens.
A landmark square in Dalian's city center, featuring a crystal ball monument and a bustling commercial area.
Dalian's modern business district, equipped with musical fountains and a seaside promenade.
A wooden boardwalk built along the coastline, offering close-up views of the sea and waves, perfect for strolling and sightseeing.
A distinctive street district preserving a complete collection of Russian-style buildings, offering an exotic cultural experience.
A historic cultural district with well-preserved modern architectural clusters and a strong artistic atmosphere.
A wooden boardwalk nestled between mountains and the sea, offering views of the Yellow Sea and the city's skyline.
A seaside park known for its unique black rock formations, featuring distinctive geological landscapes.
A viewpoint for panoramic views of Dalian, overlooking the city and the coastline.
A modern museum showcasing Dalian's urban development and industrial civilization.
